name: Luggage Collect Game
description: Luggage Collect is an exciting and fast-paced arcade game that tests your focus, speed, and decision-making skills. Your mission is simple but challenging: collect the correct luggage at the right time and avoid mistakes. As the game progresses, the speed increases, making each level more intense and fun. Stay alert, react quickly, and prove your skills as you move through increasingly difficult stages. With smooth controls and engaging gameplay, Luggage Collect keeps players hooked for hours.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
